assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and an email address they can verify.
No Marqeta.com account, public sandbox, or API credentials exist yet.
Public sandbox simulation is in scope; private sandbox and production card programs are out of scope.

developer_goal: Create a Marqeta.com account and complete the earliest official Core API Quick Start first success through a simulated sandbox transaction.

first_success.outcome: A simulated $10 VISA authorization completes in the public sandbox for a card created in the Quick Start.
first_success.observable_signal: The simulations cardtransactions authorization request succeeds and Transaction Timeline can show the simulated transaction for the active card token.

route_selection.surface: Marqeta Core API Quick Start plus Marqeta.com account and Dashboard
route_selection.rule: Select the shortest complete account-to-simulated-transaction path only after sandbox provisioning order and request surface (interactive widget versus cURL) are fixed.

candidates.name: Account creation auto-provisions sandbox and user, then card product, card, and simulation
candidates.reason: Core API Quick Start and Account Management state that creating a Marqeta.com account also creates a sandbox and a user.

candidates.name: Sign in, Create sandbox, wait for ready email, then create user via API or widget
candidates.reason: The same Quick Start separately instructs Create sandbox, email wait, Dashboard credentials, and a POST /users step after account creation.

candidates.name: Interactive docs widgets versus Sample cURLs for user, card, and simulation
candidates.reason: Widgets require signed-in docs sessions; Sample cURLs use Dashboard Basic-auth keys. Action counts differ without a named default.

required_path.action: Create a Marqeta.com account from the official create-account form.

required_fields.label: Password
required_fields.notes: Public UI requires at least 16 characters with lower case, capital letters, numbers, and symbols.

required_path.observable_result: Marqeta accepts the account registration and begins verification.

required_path.action: Complete account verification from the Marqeta email, then sign in.
required_path.observable_result: The developer is authenticated to Marqeta.com and can open Docs or Dashboard.

required_path.action: Resolve sandbox readiness and obtain Application token, Admin access token, and Base URL from the Dashboard.

required_fields.label: Sandbox provisioning path
required_fields.notes: Docs conflict on whether Create sandbox is still required after account creation auto-provisions a sandbox.

required_path.observable_result: Public sandbox API credentials are available for authenticated requests.

required_path.action: Create or obtain the Quick Start user, retrieve a Reloadable Card product token, create a card, and simulate the $10 authorization.

required_fields.label: User first_name and last_name (minimal create)
required_fields.notes: May be skipped if account creation already provisioned a usable user token; unresolved against Create a user step.

required_path.observable_result: The simulated authorization completes for the active card.

required_path.action: Open Transaction Timeline for the active card token and confirm the simulated transaction history.
required_path.observable_result: Transaction Timeline displays the simulated card transaction.

prerequisites.description: Access to Marqeta Docs while signed in if using interactive widgets, or a client able to call sandbox-api.marqeta.com with Basic auth.

external_gates.description: Account email verification is required before signing in and using the Dashboard or widgets.

unavoidable_waits.description: Account verification email delivery is required before sign-in.
If Create sandbox remains required, Marqeta emails when the sandbox is ready before Dashboard credentials appear.

platform_outcomes.description: Marqeta creates the Marqeta.com account and, depending on route interpretation, a public sandbox and user.
Dashboard exposes Application token, Admin access token, Base URL, and a sample sandbox cURL.
Simulation and Transaction Timeline reflect the authorized test transaction.

excluded.item: Webhook notification setup after the simulated transaction
excluded.reason: Core API Quick Start lists webhook setup as an additional learning goal after the Transact step.

excluded.item: Optional Marqeta news and updates checkbox
excluded.reason: The create-account form presents marketing email as optional.

excluded.item: Private sandbox and production program operations
excluded.reason: Quick Start targets public sandbox learning and warns production behavior differs.

sources.title: Core API Quick Start
evidence_supported: User, card product, and card steps

sources.title: Marqeta.com Account Management
evidence_supported: Account creation also creates sandbox and user claim
Dashboard API key and timeline access

uncertainties.question: Does Marqeta.com account creation already provision the first sandbox and user, or must the developer still Create sandbox and POST /users?
uncertainties.impact: Provisioning order changes required actions, waits, and whether user_token creation is mandatory.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account walkthrough showing whether Create sandbox and Create a user still appear after signup.

uncertainties.question: Are interactive docs widgets or Sample cURLs the canonical request surface for the shortest Transact path?
uncertainties.impact: Widgets and cURL change auth setup and whether Dashboard key copying is on the critical path.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official recommendation of one request surface for Core API Quick Start first success.
